props.name: randomRotation
props.description: Applies a random rotation to each card for a 'messy' look.

props.name: sensitivity
props.description: Drag sensitivity for sending a card to the back.

props.name: sendToBackOnClick
props.description: When enabled, the stack also shifts to the next card on click.

props.name: cards
props.description: The array of card elements to display in the stack.

props.name: animationConfig
props.description: Configures the spring animation's stiffness and damping.

props.name: autoplay
props.description: When enabled, the stack automatically cycles through cards.

props.name: autoplayDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds between automatic card transitions.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: When enabled, autoplay pauses when hovering over the stack.
